applicability_notes: Elementwise natural logarithm. Direct 1:1 replacement for torch.log. Supports fast_and_approximate_mode flag (seen in pow-decomposition test: ttnn.log(xt, fast_and_approximate_mode=True)). Handles special values (0 -> -inf, negative -> nan, inf -> inf); golden comparison uses equal_nan=True. Fusable as unary activation into preceding compute ops via unary op chaining.

placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.from_torch(in_data, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) with default (DRAM interleaved) memory_config, then ttnn.log(input_tensor)
